steps.title: Substitute x = 2
steps.content:
The function is $f(x)=x^3+9$. To find $f(2)$, replace $x$ with $2$:
$$f(2)=2^3+9$$

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: Choice A treats $2^3$ like $2+3$. Choice B treats it like $2\cdot3$. The cube means $2\cdot2\cdot2=8$.

steps.title: Answer
steps.content: $17$ matches choice C, so C is correct.
